From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Ugandan television series

| *The Honourables* | |
| --- | --- |
| Genre | [Drama](/wiki/Drama "Drama") |
| Starring | * Hellen Lukoma * Symon Base Kalema * [Aisha Kyomuhangi](/wiki/Aisha_Kyomuhangi "Aisha Kyomuhangi") * Philip Luswata * Malaika * [Doreen Mirembe](/wiki/Doreen_Mirembe "Doreen Mirembe") * Candy Mutesi * Patricko Mujuuka * Stecia Mayanja |
| Opening theme | The Honourables |
| Country of origin | Uganda |
| Original language | English |
| No. of seasons | 21 |
| Production | |
| Production location | [Kampala](/wiki/Kampala "Kampala") |
| Camera setup | [Multi-camera](/wiki/Multi-camera "Multi-camera") |
| Running time | 45 minutes |
| Production company | [NTV Uganda](/wiki/NTV_Uganda "NTV Uganda") |
| Original release | |
| Network | * [NTV Uganda](/wiki/NTV_Uganda "NTV Uganda") * [Pearl Magic](/wiki/Pearl_Magic "Pearl Magic") |
| Release | 9 January 2017 (2017-01-09) – present |

***The Honourables*** is a Ugandan [political satire](/wiki/Political_satire "Political satire")-[drama series](/wiki/Drama "Drama") that premiered on [NTV Uganda](/wiki/NTV_Uganda "NTV Uganda") on 9 January 2017, starring Hellen Lukoma, Symon Base Kalema, Aisha Kyomuhangi, Philip Luswata, Malaika, [Doreen Mirembe](/wiki/Doreen_Mirembe "Doreen Mirembe"), Candy Mutesi, Patricko Mujuuka and singer Stecia Mayanja.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2) The series which was also later picked up by Pearl Magic in 2018 exposes the vices of MPs and other government officials who frequent a local bar in Kampala, showing their greed, corruption, adultery and many other vices.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

| Best actress | [Doreen Mirembe](/wiki/Doreen_Mirembe "Doreen Mirembe") | Nominated |
| Hellen Lukoma | Won |
| Mutesi Candy | Nominated |
| 2019 | [Uganda Film Festival Awards](/wiki/Uganda_Film_Festival_Awards "Uganda Film Festival Awards") | [Best TV Drama](/wiki/Uganda_Film_Festival_Award_for_Best_Television_Drama "Uganda Film Festival Award for Best Television Drama") |  | Nominated | [[5]](#cite_note-5) |
| [Best Actress in TV Drama](/wiki/Uganda_Film_Festival_Award_for_Best_Actress_in_a_Television_Drama "Uganda Film Festival Award for Best Actress in a Television Drama") | Aisha Kyomuhangi | Nominated |
| [Best Actor in a TV Drama](/wiki/Uganda_Film_Festival_Award_for_Best_Actor_in_a_Television_Drama "Uganda Film Festival Award for Best Actor in a Television Drama") | Patrick MuJuuka | Nominated |
